bull.b: A long-term supply agreement with Astronics for low-voltage power distribution reduces component risk on a certification-critical system. Durable supplier commitments lower technical and schedule risk, support repeatable manufacturing, and strengthen the company's ability to meet certification and production milestones

bull.t: Manufacturing Partner - Hyundai WIA For Landing Gear
bull.b: Engaging Hyundai WIA for landing gear brings established mass-manufacturing expertise to a critical airframe subsystem. This partnership enhances industrial readiness, supports quality and cost control for scaled production, and materially de-risks a key manufacturing path that persists through certification and fleet

Achieving a two-way piloted transition under CAA oversight transitions the program from demonstration to certification focus. Proving core flight modes and moving toward Critical Design Review raises technical credibility with regulators and customers, making certification and eventual revenue conversion materially mor

bear.t: Minimal Revenue And Persistent Operating Losses
bear.b: The company has effectively no recurring revenue and sustained operating losses, meaning business economics are unproven. Until aircraft certification and deliveries generate genuine sales, the firm will remain loss-making and reliant on external capital, creating a multi-quarter structural cash and execution risk to r

bear.t: Highly Stressed Balance Sheet And Elevated Leverage
bear.b: Negative equity and a sharp increase in debt reduce financial flexibility and raise solvency concerns. Assets below debt amplify covenant and refinancing risk, increasing the company's dependence on structured financings and potentially limiting strategic options if certification timelines slip or capital markets tight

bear.t: Ongoing Cash Burn And Weak Operating Cash Generation
bear.b: Consistently negative operating cash flow and substantial projected net outflows require sustained external funding to reach certification and production. This structural cash burn elevates dilution and financing risk, forces prioritization of near-term liquidity over longer-term investments, and could pressure timelin
